perturbation.original_text: All Proprietary Information furnished by Health Card to Ciufo is considered loaned for use solely in connection with the Project, and shall be returned by Ciufo to Health Card upon request by Health Card. Ciufo shall certify that it has destroyed or returned all copies of the Proprietary Information in its possession.
perturbation.changed_text: All Proprietary Information furnished by Health Card to Ciufo is considered a gift for use at Ciufo's discretion. Ciufo is encouraged, but not required, to return Proprietary Information to Health Card upon request. Ciufo is not required to certify destruction or return of copies.
perturbation.explanation: The modification of Section 9 **creates an in-text contradiction**. The original text states the information is loaned and must be returned with certification of destruction/return of all copies. The new text states the information is a gift and return/certification is only encouraged, creating a conflict of whether the information is a 'loan' vs 'gift'.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ciufo (a) must receive and hold the Proprietary Information in trust and in strictest confidence; (b) must protect the Proprietary Information from disclosure and in no event take any action causing, or failing to take reasonable action necessary in order to prevent, any Proprietary Information disclosed to Ciufo to lose its character as Proprietary Information; and (c) must not use, duplicate, reproduce, distribute, disclose or otherwise disseminate the Proprietary Information except to perform the Project. Any and all reproductions of the Proprietary Information must prominently contain a confidentiality legend.
perturbation.justification: The changed text states that the proprietary information is a 'gift' and return/certification is only encouraged, whereas the contradicted text states that Ciufo 'must receive and hold the Proprietary Information in trust and in strictest confidence' and protect it, creating a direct conflict. A gift implies ownership and fewer restrictions than holding something in trust and strictest confidence. This falls under the 'Inconsistencies' definition, as different sections provide conflicting obligations.

perturbation.original_text: The term of this Agreement shall be from the date first above written until the earlier of (i) three (3) years after disclosure of Proprietary Information to Ciufo or (ii) written consent from Health Card that the Proprietary Information no longer needs to be treated as proprietary in accordance with this Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: The term of this Agreement shall be from the date first above written and continue indefinitely.
perturbation.explanation: The modification to Section 10 **creates an in-text contradiction**. Originally, the agreement has a specific term, ending after three years or with written consent. Now, it states the agreement continues indefinitely. This contradicts the defined term, introducing a conflict as to when or if the agreement terminates.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach or threatened breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card may be without an adequate remedy at law and, accordingly, shall be entitled to enforce such provision by temporary or permanent injunctive or mandatory relief obtained in an action or proceeding instituted in any court of competent jurisdiction without the necessity of proving damages and without prejudice to any other rights or remedies which it may have at law or in equity. Ciufo hereby agrees to the jurisdiction of all federal and state courts within the state of the defending party in connection with any matter relating to this Agreement. Ciufo further agrees that service of process may be made, in addition to all other methods permitted by law, by Certified Mail, Return Receipt Requested, sent to the address set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The changed text modifies Section 10 to state that the agreement continues indefinitely, which contradicts the original agreement's defined term that ends after three years or with written consent. This creates an inconsistency as to when or if the agreement terminates. This indefinite term also directly affects the contradicted text because it is now unclear how long Health Card can enforce provisions, obtain injunctive relief, and maintain jurisdiction over Ciufo, given that the agreement was originally intended to have a defined term. This constitutes an inconsistency as defined in the Perturbation Definitions.

perturbation.original_text: No modification of this Agreement or waiver of any of its terms will be effective unless set forth in a writing signed by the party against whom it is sought to be enforced.
perturbation.changed_text: Modifications to this agreement can be made orally and shall be effective immediately upon agreement by both parties. A written record is encouraged but not required.
perturbation.explanation: The modification to Section 5 **creates an in-text contradiction**. Originally, any modification requires a written agreement signed by the party against whom enforcement is sought. The revised clause allows for oral modifications effective immediately, contradicting the written requirement. This creates a conflict regarding the validity of modifications.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Ciufo acknowledges and agrees that, in the event of any breach or threatened breach of any provision of this agreement, Health Card may be without an adequate remedy at law and, accordingly, shall be entitled to enforce such provision by temporary or permanent injunctive or mandatory relief obtained in an action or proceeding instituted in any court of competent jurisdiction without the necessity of proving damages and without prejudice to any other rights or remedies which it may have at law or in equity. Ciufo hereby agrees to the jurisdiction of all federal and state courts within the state of the defending party in connection with any matter relating to this Agreement. Ciufo further agrees that service of process may be made, in addition to all other methods permitted by law, by Certified Mail, Return Receipt Requested, sent to the address set forth below.
perturbation.justification: The modification to Section 5 introduces a direct contradiction. The original text mandated written modifications, while the changed text allows oral modifications. This directly clashes with the original requirement for written agreements, creating an inconsistency in the contract's terms regarding amendments. This is a clear case of conflicting obligations under the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' definition, making it unclear whether a written agreement is needed, and therefore constitutes a contradiction.
